content.rendered:
Payment Help Center and Becoming a Premium Member…

First of all, thank you for subscribing to our website tabooincest.net and we are happy to have you with us and satisfy your fantastic pleasures through our videos.

For those who did not create an account on the website before making the payment…

All those who chose to buy the Lifetime Subscription package and were in a hurry to pay and did not have an account on our website, the system and payment processor automatically create an account for you with the email address you used to make the payment and will send you an email “check your spam folder” with a password reset, and if you do not receive that email with a password reset immediately after payment, all you have to do after the payment has been made is to enter the website and press the “Login” button at the top left of the website, enter the email address you used to make the payment and press the “Lost Password” button and you will receive a temporary password on your email address, then return to the website, press the “Login” button and re-enter the email address and password you received on your email and you will have access to the new account created by the payment processor…

Don’t forget to change your password after logging in because the temporary password expires in 12 hours and then you will no longer have access to the account and must repeat the above procedure with the “Lost Password” function.

Users who already have an account and want to subscribe to the Lifetime Subscription Package

If you already have an account and subscribe on the website immediately after payment your account becomes “Premium” and the videos are automatically unlocked for your subscribed account.
However, there is a small problem for those who have an account with a specific email address and made the payment with a different email address. If the payment processor does not find your email address in the database, it will automatically create another account for you and the account you already have on the website will remain a free account without a subscription because the payment was not made with the same email address. In this case, to avoid any inconvenience, you must send an email to admin@tabooincest.net specifying your account on the website and the account with which you made the payment in order to cancel the automatically created account and to be able to transfer your real one to the “Premium” stage so that you can watch any video on the website without any problems.

Subscription Cancellation

If you decide and do not want to be a “Premium” user anymore even though it is for life, and you want your account to be deleted, you just have to send an email to admin@tabooincest.net and specify that you want your account to be deleted and within 12 hours the account will be deleted…

Please note that once you have chosen this option, there is no refund for the money paid for Subscription and if you want to open another account and become a Premium member again, you will have to make a new payment.

If you have any questions or concerns, send an email to admin@tabooincest.net
